documents.summary: Medical coverage, PBM, pharmacy, demographics, and clinical review checkpoints.
documents.title: Registration Gate Checklist

documents.summary: Freshness standards for labs, infection screen, prescription, authorizations, and transport notes.
documents.title: Dialysis Transfer Packet Index

documents.summary: Musculoskeletal code checks, laterality matching, duplicate review, and authorization follow-up.
documents.title: Orthopedics Referral Triage Aid

documents.summary: Consent, diagnosis, lab/vital, renal flag, and telehealth preference review.
documents.title: Chronic Program Enrollment Form

policies.body: Use the latest portal-verified eligibility snapshot. Medical insurance must be active on the review date and in network. A stale card image never overrides verified portal status. Medication-managed intake also requires active PBM and an in-network preferred pharmacy.
policies.title: Registration gates

policies.body: Labs are current within 30 days of requested start; infection screening is current within 14 days. Dialysis prescription must be final. Medication list, allergy list, authorization, confidentiality statement, referring contact, and transport note are required.
policies.title: Dialysis transfer freshness

policies.body: Scheduling requires an M-code or supported musculoskeletal diagnosis, agreement between narrative and laterality, required clinical records and imaging, and payer authorization when required. Duplicate checks use patient demographics and condition.
policies.title: Orthopedics referral scheduling

policies.body: A chart is ready only when demographics, history, applicable active problems, current vitals, onboarding care plan or clinical instructions, and orientation communication are complete.
policies.title: Chart readiness

policies.body: Diabetes and hypertension pathways require active diagnosis, recent labs or vitals, consent, and a complete program form. Renal risk changes cadence and may require nurse escalation.
policies.title: Chronic program enrollment
